_documentation: This file contains all editable content for your portfolio. You can edit this file to add, remove, or modify sections, subsections, and content without touching the code. Save this file and the changes will appear on your site.

_instructions.overview: Each section is organized by component. Edit the values directly.
_instructions.text: All text content can be freely edited - it's stored in 'text' fields.
_instructions.lists: Arrays like 'highlights', 'skills', 'technologies' can have items added, removed, or reordered.
_instructions.items: Objects with 'id' fields can be added or removed. Adding a new item just requires a unique id.
_instructions.booleans: 'featured: true' shows items prominently, 'featured: false' archives them.

hero.statusText: AVAILABLE FOR AI ENGINEERING, DATA ANALYTICS & RESEARCH COLLABORATIONS

highlights.text: 3+ years building AI and data systems
Research in intelligent systems and BCI

hero.biography: I build intelligent systems at the intersection of data, machine learning, and research—from large-scale analytics and agentic AI to computer vision and brain–computer interfaces.

about.headline: Building intelligent systems where data, AI, and human cognition intersect.
paragraphs: I currently work as a Data Analytics Apprentice at Google, supporting large-customer sales through campaign analytics, automated reporting, performance optimization, and agentic AI systems.

My broader interests span world models, intelligent agents, multimodal reasoning, computational neuroscience, and space technology. I enjoy turning complex research ideas into systems that work beyond the prototype stage.

projects.title: Featured Missions
projects.subtitle: Selected projects showcasing expertise in AI, data systems, and research.

items.title: Brain-Computer Interface: Tetris Outcome Prediction
items.objective: Real-time BCI system using EEG signals to predict Tetris gameplay outcomes
items.description: Developed a real-time brain-computer interface system that processes EEG signals collected using an OpenBCI UltraCortex headset during Tetris gameplay. Applied signal processing, feature extraction, data analysis, and machine-learning techniques to investigate neural activity and predict gameplay outcomes.

items.title: AI-Powered Legal Document Summarization and Translation
items.objective: End-to-end platform for legal document OCR, summarization, and multilingual translation
items.description: Built an intelligent legal-document platform that extracts text using OCR, summarizes complex legal content using language models, and translates information into Indian languages to improve accessibility.

items.title: AI Pothole Detection and Road-Maintenance System
items.objective: Computer-vision system for real-time road damage detection with geospatial tracking
items.description: Developed a computer-vision system for detecting road damage using YOLO, edge-computing hardware, cameras, and GPS. Designed the system to identify potholes, capture geospatial information, and support infrastructure monitoring through analytical dashboards.

items.title: Interactive 3D Protein Structure Prediction
items.objective: Web application for protein structure prediction from amino acid sequences
items.description: Created an interactive application that predicts protein structures from amino-acid sequences and visualizes the generated structures in three dimensions using ESMFold.

items.title: Emotion Recognition Through Brain-Computer Interface
items.objective: EEG-based emotion classification using signal processing and machine learning
items.description: Explored emotion recognition using EEG signals, signal-processing methods, feature extraction, and machine-learning models to classify emotional states from neural activity patterns.

directions.title: World Models
directions.description: Investigating how AI systems can build internal representations of environments for improved decision-making and prediction.

directions.title: LLM-Assisted Rule Verification in World Models
directions.description: Exploring whether external language models can function as high-level reasoning and verification systems within simulated environments.

directions.title: Intelligent Agents
directions.description: Developing autonomous agents that can perceive, reason, and act in complex environments with minimal human intervention.

directions.title: AI Reasoning
directions.description: Advancing symbolic and neural approaches to mathematical reasoning, logical inference, and problem-solving.

directions.title: Deterministic Consistency in Simulated Environments
directions.description: Ensuring reproducible and consistent behavior in physics simulations for reliable agent training.

directions.title: Multimodal Intelligence
directions.description: Integrating vision, language, audio, and other modalities for comprehensive AI understanding.

directions.title: Computational Neuroscience
directions.description: Using computational methods to understand brain function, neural coding, and cognitive processes.

directions.title: Brain-Computer Interfaces
directions.description: Developing non-invasive BCI systems for neural signal interpretation and real-time feedback applications.

directions.title: AI for Space Exploration
directions.description: Applying machine learning to autonomous navigation, planetary analysis, and spacecraft decision systems.

publications.title: A Method for Doctor's Handwritten Text Recognition
publications.description: Utilizing Deep Learning and Ambiguity Handling for handwritten medical record extraction.

publications.title: Neural Signatures of Eye Blinking
publications.description: EEG analysis for inferencing complex cognitive processes during voluntary actions. Awarded Best Paper.

currentFocus.title: LLM-Assisted Rule Verification in World Models
currentFocus.summary: Investigating whether an external language model can function as a high-level reasoning and verification system within a simulated world model—evaluating events, checking consistency with environmental rules, and supporting more coherent long-term simulations.

skills.title: Core Competencies
skills.subtitle: Technical expertise across AI, data, and research domains.

experience.title: Career & Education
experience.subtitle: A timeline of professional experience and academic background.

items.title: Data Analytics Apprentice
items.description: Supporting Large Customer Sales through enterprise analytics, campaign-performance optimization, automated reporting, and agentic AI systems.
highlights: Analyze campaign metrics and user behavior to improve targeting, bidding strategies, account structure, and ROAS.
Build dashboards and automated reporting systems for KPI monitoring and faster client decision-making.
Develop internal tools for SQL generation and deterministic validation using agentic AI, SQLGlot, cloud computing, and advanced statistical methods.

items.title: Digital Analyst
items.description: Delivered advanced analytics and automation solutions across lead-generation and publisher clients using GA4, BigQuery, SQL, statistics, and agentic workflows.
highlights: Identified conversion gaps and developed data-backed marketing strategies.
Automated reporting workflows using n8n and Google Agentspace.
Performed root-cause analysis across complex client reporting systems.
Delivered attribution, cohort, funnel, and customer-journey analyses.

items.title: Computer Vision & Data Engineer
items.description: Developed computer-vision, IoT, and analytical systems for real-world infrastructure monitoring.
highlights: Contributed to Legolas, a YOLO-powered pothole-detection system achieving 95% mAP.
Integrated computer vision, geospatial tagging, edge computing, and analytical dashboards.
Researched SLAM and ROS 2 simulations to evaluate model accuracy and deployment feasibility.

items.title: Data Science Research Intern
items.organization: Center of Advanced Research and Engineering
items.description: Conducted brain–computer interface research examining the cognitive effects of voluntary actions through EEG signals.
highlights: Applied deep learning, statistical analysis, signal processing, and data visualization to neural data.
Contributed to research on neural signatures and cognitive inference.
